content: Curiosity intrinsic reward modules (ICM/RND) for autonomous agents can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning and prioritization gate for 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory, where only information that triggers non-trivial prediction error (the core signal of curiosity mechanisms) is retained long-term. This creates a self-organizing memory system that automatically prioritizes uncertain, learnable new data over redundant, predictable observations without manual retention threshold tuning.
